title: Commutators
summary: Derives the Euler/defining-function/Laplacian identities used in the tangentiality argument, including XQ = 2Q and the Laplacian–Q commutator.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Derives the Euler/defining-function/Laplacian identities used in the tangentiality argument, including XQ = 2Q and the Laplacian–Q commutator.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/FG/Commutators.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For L of type Normal Laplacian Model A, L.X normal Q A equals the function sending U to 2 times normal Q A U.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,L\colon \operatorname{NormalLaplacianModel} A,\quad X_{\mathrm{L}} (\operatorname{normalQ} A) = U \longmapsto 2 \cdot \operatorname{normalQ} A U
correspondence.leanType: theorem straightForm_X_Q (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : L.X (normalQ A) = fun U => 2 * normalQ A U

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For L of type Normal Laplacian Model A, and f of type Operators.Function Conf, L.X L.ambient Laplacian f equals the function sending U to L.ambient Laplacian L.X f U minus 2 times L.ambient Laplacian f U.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,L\colon \operatorname{NormalLaplacianModel} A,\;f\colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf},\quad X_{\mathrm{L}} (L.\operatorname{laplacian} f) = U \longmapsto L.\operatorname{laplacian} (X_{\mathrm{L}} f) U - 2 \cdot L.\operatorname{laplacian} f U
correspondence.leanType: theorem straightForm_X_laplacian_comm (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) (f : Operators.Function Conf) : L.X (L.laplacian f) = fun U => L.laplacian (L.X f) U - 2 * L.laplacian f U

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For L of type Normal Laplacian Model A, and f of type Operators.Function Conf, L.ambient Laplacian normal Qmul A f equals the function sending U to normal Q A U times L.ambient Laplacian f U plus 2 times 2 times L.X f U plus L.base Dim plus 2 times f U.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,L\colon \operatorname{NormalLaplacianModel} A,\;f\colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf},\quad L.\operatorname{laplacian} (\operatorname{normalQmul} A f) = U \longmapsto \operatorname{normalQ} A U \cdot L.\operatorname{laplacian} f U + 2 \cdot (2 \cdot X_{\mathrm{L}} f U + (L.\operatorname{baseDim} + 2) \cdot f U)
correspondence.leanType: theorem straightForm_lap_Q_comm (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) (f : Operators.Function Conf) : L.laplacian (normalQmul A f) = fun U => normalQ A U * L.laplacian f U + 2 * (2 * L.X f U + (L.baseDim + 2) * f U)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For L of type Normal Laplacian Model A, m in the natural numbers, w in the real numbers, f of type Operators.Function Conf, and hf of type L.X f equals the function sending U to w times f U, L.ambient Laplacian normal Qpow Mul A m f equals the function sending U to normal Q A U to the power m times L.ambient Laplacian f U plus 2 times m times 2 times w plus L.base Dim plus 2 times m times normal Q A U to the power m minus 1 times f U.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,L\colon \operatorname{NormalLaplacianModel} A,\;m\colon \mathbb{N},\;w\colon \mathbb{R},\;f\colon \operatorname{Operators}.\operatorname{Function} \operatorname{Conf},\;hf\colon X_{\mathrm{L}} f = U \longmapsto w \cdot f U,\quad L.\operatorname{laplacian} (\operatorname{normalQpowMul} A m f) = U \longmapsto \operatorname{normalQ} A U ^ m \cdot L.\operatorname{laplacian} f U + 2 \cdot m \cdot (2 \cdot w + L.\operatorname{baseDim} + 2 \cdot m ) \cdot \operatorname{normalQ} A U ^ (m - 1) \cdot f U
correspondence.leanType: theorem straightForm_lap_Qpow_of_XHomogeneous (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) (m : ℕ) {w : ℝ} {f : Operators.Function Conf} (hf : L.X f = fun U => w * f U) : L.laplacian (normalQpowMul A m f) = fun U => normalQ A U ^ m * L.laplacian f U + 2 * (m : ℝ) * (2 * w + L.baseDim + 2 * (m : ℝ)) * normalQ A U ^ (m - 1) * f U

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
